---
title: "final_collection"
author: "Abigail Deegan, Owen O'Connor, Kate Whelan and Aditya Sonawane"
date: "2026-04-21"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

```{r libraries, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
library(tidyverse)
library(lubridate)
library(plotly)
```

---

## Data

```{r load-data, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
# Full dataset (Adi + Owen)
nics_data <- read_csv("../data/nics-firearm-background-checks.csv") |>
  mutate(date = ym(month), year = year(date))

# Last-five-years subset (Kate)
nics_recent <- read_csv("../data/partial/nics-checks-last-five-years.csv") |>
  mutate(state = tolower(state))

# US map polygons (Kate)
us_map <- map_data("state")

# State population data (Owen)
state_pop <- readRDS("../data/other_sources/population/state_pop_2000_2023.RDS")
```

---

## Permit vs. Sales-like Checks by State

```{r permit-vs-sales}
permit_sales_by_state <- nics_data |>
  mutate(
    permit_total = permit + permit_recheck,
    sales_total  = handgun + long_gun + other + multiple
  ) |>
  group_by(state) |>
  summarise(
    permit = sum(permit_total, na.rm = TRUE),
    sales  = sum(sales_total,  na.rm = TRUE)
  ) |>
  pivot_longer(cols = c(permit, sales), names_to = "check_type", values_to = "count")

permit_sales_by_state |>
  ggplot(aes(x = reorder(state, count), y = count, fill = check_type)) +
  geom_col(position = "dodge") +
  coord_flip() +
  labs(
    title = "Permit vs. Sales-like Checks by State",
    x     = "State",
    y     = "Count",
    fill  = "Check Type"
  ) +
  theme_minimal()
```

---

## US Background Checks Over Time

```{r us-trend, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
us_monthly_trend <- nics_data |>
  group_by(date) |>
  summarise(total_checks = sum(totals, na.rm = TRUE)) |>
  ungroup()

us_monthly_trend |>
  ggplot(aes(x = date, y = total_checks)) +
  geom_line() +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = FALSE) +
  labs(
    title = "US Firearm Background Checks Over Time",
    x     = "Year",
    y     = "Total Checks"
  ) +
  theme_minimal()
```

---

## Permit Totals by State (Map)

```{r map-data}
state_permit_totals <- nics_recent |>
  group_by(state) |>
  summarise(total_permit = sum(permit, na.rm = TRUE))

state_recheck_totals <- nics_recent |>
  group_by(state) |>
  summarise(total_rechecks = sum(permit_recheck, na.rm = TRUE))

map_permits <- us_map |>
  left_join(state_permit_totals, by = c("region" = "state")) |>
  mutate(scaled_value = 2 * (percent_rank(log10(total_permit + 1)) - 0.5))

map_rechecks <- us_map |>
  left_join(state_recheck_totals, by = c("region" = "state")) |>
  mutate(scaled_value = 2 * (percent_rank(log10(total_rechecks + 1)) - 0.5))
```

```{r map-permits}
g_permits <- ggplot(
  map_permits,
  aes(x = long, y = lat, group = group, fill = scaled_value,
      text = paste("State:", region, "<br>Permits:", total_permit))
) +
  geom_polygon(color = "white") +
  scale_fill_gradient2(low = "blue", mid = "white", high = "red", midpoint = 0) +
  labs(title = "Total Firearm Permits by State (Last 5 Years)", fill = "Scaled Permits") +
  theme_dark()

ggplotly(g_permits, tooltip = "text")
```

```{r map-rechecks}
g_rechecks <- ggplot(
  map_rechecks,
  aes(x = long, y = lat, group = group, fill = scaled_value,
      text = paste("State:", region, "<br>Permit Rechecks:", total_rechecks))
) +
  geom_polygon(color = "white") +
  scale_fill_gradient2(low = "red", mid = "white", high = "blue", midpoint = 0) +
  labs(title = "Total Firearm Permit Rechecks by State (Last 5 Years)", fill = "Scaled Rechecks") +
  theme_dark()

ggplotly(g_rechecks, tooltip = "text")
```

---

## Population-Adjusted Checks: Segment Analysis

```{r segment-data}
us_states      <- c(state.name, "District of Columbia")
segment_levels <- c("2000–2005", "2006–2011", "2012–2017", "2018–2023")
excluded_states <- c("Kentucky", "Illinois", "Utah", "Indiana",
                     "North Carolina", "California", "North Dakota")

annual_pop <- nics_data |>
  filter(state %in% us_states, year >= 2000, year <= 2023) |>
  group_by(state, year) |>
  summarise(annual_total = sum(totals, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop") |>
  left_join(state_pop, by = c("state", "year")) |>
  mutate(
    checks_per_100k = (annual_total / population) * 1e5,
    checks_per_1k   = (annual_total / population) * 1000,
    segment = case_when(
      year %in% 2000:2005 ~ "2000–2005",
      year %in% 2006:2011 ~ "2006–2011",
      year %in% 2012:2017 ~ "2012–2017",
      year %in% 2018:2023 ~ "2018–2023",
      TRUE                ~ NA_character_
    )
  ) |>
  filter(!is.na(checks_per_100k), checks_per_100k > 0,
         !is.na(segment), checks_per_1k > 0) |>
  mutate(segment = factor(segment, levels = segment_levels))
```

```{r segment-slopes}
extract_slope <- function(d) {
  fit <- lm(checks_per_1k ~ year, data = d)
  cf  <- coef(summary(fit))
  ci  <- confint(fit)
  tibble(
    slope     = cf["year", "Estimate"],
    se        = cf["year", "Std. Error"],
    conf.low  = ci["year", 1],
    conf.high = ci["year", 2],
    p.value   = cf["year", "Pr(>|t|)"]
  )
}

segment_slopes <- annual_pop |>
  group_by(state, segment) |>
  nest() |>
  mutate(tidied = purrr::map(data, extract_slope)) |>
  unnest(tidied) |>
  select(state, segment, slope, se, conf.low, conf.high, p.value) |>
  ungroup()
```

```{r ftest}
run_ftest <- function(d) {
  mod_full    <- lm(checks_per_1k ~ year * segment, data = d)
  mod_reduced <- lm(checks_per_1k ~ year + segment, data = d)
  av <- anova(mod_reduced, mod_full)
  tibble(
    df        = av$Df[2],
    statistic = av$F[2],
    p.value   = av$'Pr(>F)'[2]
  )
}

ftest_results <- annual_pop |>
  group_by(state) |>
  nest() |>
  mutate(res = purrr::map(data, run_ftest)) |>
  unnest(res) |>
  select(state, df, statistic, p.value) |>
  mutate(
    significant = p.value < 0.05,
    sig_label   = if_else(significant, "Significant (p < 0.05)", "Not Significant")
  ) |>
  ungroup()

n_sig <- sum(ftest_results$significant)
n_tot <- nrow(ftest_results)
```

**7 of 51 territories** show significantly different slopes across time segments (α = 0.05).

```{r ftest-table}
ftest_results |>
  filter(significant) |>
  arrange(p.value) |>
  select(State = state, 'F-statistic' = statistic, 'p-value' = p.value) |>
  mutate(across(where(is.numeric), \(x) round(x, 4))) |>
  knitr::kable(caption = "States with Significantly Varying Slopes (p < 0.05)")
```

```{r slopes-plot}
valid_sig_states <- ftest_results |>
  filter(significant, !state %in% excluded_states)

segment_slopes |>
  filter(state %in% valid_sig_states$state) |>
  ggplot(aes(x = segment, y = slope, group = state, colour = state)) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", colour = "grey55", linewidth = 0.5) +
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin = conf.low, ymax = conf.high), width = 0.25, alpha = 0.5) +
  geom_line() +
  geom_point(size = 2) +
  facet_wrap(~ state, scales = "free_y", ncol = 3) +
  labs(
    title = "Rate of Change in Checks per 1,000 by Segment",
    x     = "",
    y     = "Rate of Change (checks/1,000/year)"
  ) +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1))
```
